description: A customer needs to add 5 more user licenses to their annual subscription.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current subscription plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the customer's account and sees they are on the 'Pro' plan.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the prorated cost for the 5 new licenses for the remainder of the subscription term.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the prorated charge.

nodes.task_description: Update the subscription quantity and process the prorated charge.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the licenses and charges the card on file.
